# StarRay Hotel
> StarRay Hotel is a hotel branding and operating platform focused on Indonesia.

Canonical site: https://www.starrayhotel.com/

## Core sections
- About Us: company profile, operating foundation, founder credentials
- The StarRay Story: brand story and vision
- Brand Essence: REST / RELAX / RESET standards
- Current Projects: Mangga Dua, IKN Mixed-use Project, Kebayoran
- Market Paradox: structural issues in Indonesia hospitality
- The Long Game: long-term value creation
- Capability Foundation: China chain-hotel expertise × Indonesia execution capability
- Execution Excellence: capital efficiency, deployment speed, demand generation, operating efficiency
- Partnership & Contact
- Booking (coming soon)

## Contact
Email: Bill.lin@starrayhotel.com
Location: Jakarta, Indonesia
